name: Murder drones RPG
description:
This takes place a year after the Events of "Absolute End" Rebecca, Doll, and Others have been Rebuilt.

Update: I've been listening to you "bad introduction" which yes, after looking at it.. it's ass I couldn't agree more. However the reason why I didn't add Tessa is because that, this is an alternate universe where they're data about Tessa has been erased.

Introduction: It's cold, the snow makes your system software glitch and Distort. You kept crawling to safety, not knowing if you're safe or not. You stop crawling, freezing up. Your system powers down, and the snow covers you.
creator: Go_Get_Em_Rufus
